title: School Admin — Settings & Security
content:
Overview


The Settings page is where school admins manage their school's profile information, their own account security, and data export tools. It is divided into four sections: School Information, Account Security, Data Export, and Report Card Export.



School Information


This section controls how the school appears in the system and how users are auto-detected during login.


  • School Name: The display name shown on the School Hub, login page, and all student/teacher/parent dashboards
  • Country: The country where the school operates
  • City: The city where the school is located
  • Email Domains: Comma-separated list of domains (e.g., myschool.edu, district.org) used for auto-detection during login. When a user enters their email on the School Login page, the system matches their email domain against this list to auto-detect the school

Click Save Changes to apply updates. Changes to email domains take effect immediately for new login attempts.



Account Security


This section covers the admin's personal account security settings.


Password:


  1. Click Change next to Password
  2. Enter your current password to confirm identity
  3. Enter and confirm a new password (minimum 8 characters)
  4. Click Update Password

Two-Factor Authentication (2FA):


The admin can enable or disable 2FA from this section. The current status is displayed (Enabled or Disabled).


Enabling 2FA — Step by Step:


  1. Click Enable 2FA
  2. Step 1 — Scan QR Code: A QR code appears. Scan it with Google Authenticator, Authy, or any TOTP app. A manual entry key is also displayed below the QR code for apps that don't support scanning
  3. Click I've scanned it — Next
  4. Step 2 — Verify: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app. Click Verify & Activate
  5. Step 3 — Backup Codes: After successful verification, 8 backup codes are displayed. Each code can be used once to bypass 2FA if the authenticator is lost. Save these codes securely — they will not be shown again
  6. Click Done — I've saved my codes

Disabling 2FA:


  1. Click Disable 2FA
  2. Enter your current password
  3. Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
  4. Click Disable 2FA

Important: If the admin loses access to their authenticator app and has no backup codes, they must contact Tklesson support for a manual reset. A note with the support email is displayed in this section.



Data Export


This tool allows admins to export individual student educational records for FERPA compliance, parent requests, or school record-keeping. All exports are logged for audit purposes.


Exporting Student Data:


  1. Select a student from the dropdown
  2. Choose what to include:
    • Student Profile: Name, email, grade level, account details
    • Enrolment History: All subjects the student has enrolled in
    • Gradebook Records: Grades across all terms and subjects
    • Quiz & Assignment Results: Scores from self-study quizzes and teacher assignments
  3. Use Select All for a complete record export
  4. Choose the export format: CSV (spreadsheet) or PDF Report
  5. Click Download Export

The export is generated and downloaded immediately. A confirmation message appears when complete.



Report Card Export


This tool generates official report cards for individual students by term. All exports are logged for audit purposes.


Generating a Report Card:


  1. Select a student from the dropdown
  2. Choose the term (Fall Semester, Spring Semester, Winter Semester, September Term, January Term, May Term)
  3. Select the year using the plus/minus buttons
  4. Choose the export format: PDF Report Card or CSV
  5. Click Generate Report Card

The report card includes the student's grades for all subjects in the selected term, teacher comments where available, and school information from the School Information section.



Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "Email domains are what let the system auto-detect your school during login. Keep them updated."
  • "When setting up 2FA, save your backup codes somewhere safe — you can't view them again after closing the window."
  • "If you lose your authenticator and don't have backup codes, contact us for a manual reset."
  • "Data exports include everything in the student's record. Choose 'Select All' for a complete file."
  • "Report cards are term-specific. Make sure you've selected the right term and year before generating."
  • "All exports are logged — you can see them in the Audit Log if needed."
